title: ChatManager
description: The plugin manages your Minecraft Chat! Colored Chat, mute and clear chat and more.
body:
# Description

Features:

The plugin manages your Minecraft Chat! All messages can be set in the config. It is simple and easy. Colored Chat, mute and clear chat and more.
- All Configurable
- Default Settings
- Simple
- Staff Chat
- Mute/Clear Chat
- Colored Chat


# Commands & Permissions

### /chatmanager mute
- This command mutes the chat
- **Required Permission:** chatmanager.mute
- **Bypass Permission:** chatmanager.mute.bypass

### /chatmanager clear
- This command clears the chat
- **Required Permission:** chatmanager.clear
- **Bypass Permission:** chatmanager.clear.bypass

### /chatmanager staff
- With this command you can write in the staff chat.
- **Required Permission:** chatmanager.staff

### /chatmanager reload
- This command reloads all configurations
- **Required Permission:** chatmanager.reload

### Colored Chat
- Use MiniMessage or legacy '&' color/format codes
- **Required Permission:** chatmanager.color

# Config

<details>
<summary>config.yml</summary>

```YML
chatMute: false
cleanChat: true
staffPrefix: '&7[&cStaff&7]'
blockChatMessage: '&7The chat is currently &cdisabled'
chatClearMessage: '&7The chat was cleared by &e%player%'
muteChatMessage: '&7The chat was muted by &e%player%'
unMuteChatMessage: '&7The chat was enabled by &e%player%'
```
ℹ️All messages in config.yml support MiniMessage and legacy '&' codes.
</details>
